name: electrobun-react-tailwind-vite
description: Electrobun app with React, Tailwind CSS, and Vite HMR

scripts.start: GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 vite build && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 electrobun dev
scripts.dev: GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 vite build && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 electrobun dev --watch
scripts.dev:hmr: concurrently "bun run hmr" "GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 ELECTROBUN_HMR=1 electrobun dev --watch"
